regional_cost_note: Drainage specialists in Christchurch typically charge $85–$160/m for French drains, $1,600–$4,200 for soakpits, and $5,500–$28,000+ for full site drainage. Canterbury rates are near the national average; post-earthquake rebuild experience is common across local trades. Poor site drainage is one of the most common causes of foundation problems — a drainage assessment is worthwhile before any significant earthworks.
